text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is so hard! Have either of you had to<n>make an
apron in your home ec class?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I haven't yet. We've only done cooking<n>practice
so far.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! An apron? Us wielders of magic<n>have our
own clothes that are so much<n>better. Who needs
an apron?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah, how unfortunate. I was hoping one<n>of you
could help me decide on a<n>design.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's only an apron, any garb for a<n>princess
to wear must have a truly<n>elegant design... Ohhh,
what to do?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then how about adding some lace to<n>it?
That'd be so cute. And some frills on<n>the hem,
maybe!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great! But, you know, it<n>probably
shouldn't be too puffy or<n>anything. It'll be used
for cooking, after<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh—I know! I should add some sparklyweights that look like jewels! They willadd elegance and help me train—twobirds, one stone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? But wouldn't that ruin the frills?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should add holsters for some<n>knives and
a pot lid, too. You never<n>know what might
happen in the kitchen!
